name: December Acolyte

abilities.name: Advanced Sights
abilities.text: This model receives a (+) when targeting models at a lower elevation.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: From Shadow
abilities.text: This model is deployed during the start phase of turn 1 anywhere on the table, not within 2" of a Strategy marker or enemy deployment zone.

actions.name: Harpoon Gun
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: Icy Pull
triggers.text: Move the target 3" toward a terrain marker in its LoS.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Desperation
triggers.text: Target must discard a card or gain a Hunger token.

actions.name: Forage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Remove target enemy Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Draw the top card of this model's discard pile.

extraction_notes: STN: 9 notation appears below the artwork but is not a standard field in the schema
